Vygotsky proposed that we develop
private speech because when we first

probably not too surprising that a lot

terrible multitaskers some researchers
have also found that if you use your
speech to direct your actions it can

example one 2011 study as 24 subjects to
quickly determine either the shape or

screen would flash either the words red

press the button for red
not for circle the researchers told

found that people who read them aloud
had much faster response times this was
just one small study with the results
